'''Matt Munro''' (born 5 February 1971) is an Australian former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s, and has [[Coach (sport)|coach]]ed in the 1990s. He played at club level in the [[New South Wales Rugby League premiership]] (1990–1994), [[Australian Rugby League]] (1995), and [[National Rugby League]] (1998) for the [[Parramatta Eels]], the [[Balmain Tigers]] and the [[South Sydney Rabbitohs]], and in 1997's [[Super League II]] for the [[Oldham R.L.F.C.|Oldham Bears]], as a {{rlp|lk}},<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.gympietimes.com.au/news/apn-munro-locks-up-qld-rugby-league/91048/|title=Munro locks up Qld rugby league spot|website=Gympie Times|language=en|access-date=2018-12-18}}</ref> and has coached at club level in 1997's [[Super League II]] for the [[Oldham R.L.F.C.|Oldham Bears]].<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/><ref name="Coach Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/>

==Playing career==
Munro began his first grade career with the [[Parramatta Eels]] in Round 8 of the 1990 season against the [[Illawarra Steelers]] in a 16–12 victory. Munro then switched to [[Balmain Tigers]] in 1992 and played with the club until the end of 1995 during which time the club was re-branded as the [[Balmain Tigers#1980s–1990s|Sydney Tigers]] for one season and played out of the [[Parramatta Stadium]] at the start of the [[Super League war]]. In 1998, Munro transferred to the [[South Sydney Rabbitohs]] and played one season with the club before retiring.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.weststigers.com.au/news/2016/06/27/former-players-to-feature-at-legends-day/|title=Former players to feature at Legends Day|date=27 June 2016|website=Wests Tigers}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.parraeels.com.au/about/official-player-numbers/|title=Official Player Numbers|website=Parramatta Eels}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.independent.co.uk/sport/goodway-makes-way-at-oldham-1268838.html |archive-url=https://ghostarchive.org/archive/20220512/https://www.independent.co.uk/sport/goodway-makes-way-at-oldham-1268838.html |archive-date=12 May 2022 |url-access=subscription |url-status=live|title=Goodway makes way at Oldham|date=1997-04-23|website=The Independent|language=en|access-date=2018-12-18}}</ref>
